title: Watch: AB de Villiers to make cricket comeback
description: CRICKET NEWS & VIDEO - AB de Villiers is...
bodyText:
Video

CRICKET NEWS & VIDEO - AB de Villiers is set to represent his country again later this year.


> The Proteas legend announced on Tuesday that he will play for SA at the World Championship of Legends tournament at Edgbaston from 18 July to 2 August.


The SA team that competed at the inaugural event last year included former Proteas Jacques Kallis, Herschelle Gibbs, Dale Steyn and Imran Tahir.

Watch a video here.

The post Watch: AB to make cricket comeback appeared first on SA Cricketmag.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
